EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation that email address has been updated.
EmailTemplate.name: Change of Email Address
EmailTemplate.subject: Change of Details
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
Your new email address has been amended on our systems and your documents have been re-sent to the new email address for your records.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
